footer.tagline: Open skills infrastructure for unmapped youth. A protocol, not a product — plug in local data and it works anywhere.
footer.aboutText: Built for youth, NGOs, training providers, and policymakers in LMICs.
footer.automationCredit: Automation data: Frey & Osborne (2017) · ILO Task Index · World Bank STEP · Wittgenstein Centre 2025–2035

landing.badge: A skill passport for unmapped youth
landing.headline: Your skills, seen.
landing.subheadline: Upload a CV or answer profile questions, and we will turn your experience into a structured skill profile.
landing.buildProfileHint: Upload a CV, or answer questions if you do not have one.

fields.willingToRelocate: Are you willing to relocate for a job?

auth.startSubtitle: Register or log in before the questionnaire so your profile data is saved to your account.

errors.loginRequired: Please register or log in before adding questionnaire data.
errors.fixedFieldsRequired: Please add your name, telephone number, location, employment, and relocation before scanning the CV.
